creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: koobs
Date: Sun Mar 10 08:51:21 2013
New Revision: 313817
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/313817

Log:
  - Update to 0.8.7p1
  - Take maintainership
  - Update pkg-plist
  - Trim Makefile header
  - Add LICENSE
  - Install buildslave man page
  - Switch to setuptools and make zip_safe=False unconditional
  - Add patch to buildslave.test that fixes pydoc -k breakage (upstreamed)
  - Remove unecessary post-patch: target
  - Use NO_INSTALL_REQ env var to avoid dependencies
  - Add TESTS options, TEST_DEPENDS and regression-test target:
  
  Changes: http://buildbot.net/buildbot/docs/0.8.7p1/relnotes/index.html
  
  Approved by:	rm (mentor), tj (maintainer)
  PR:		ports/174412

Added:
  head/devel/buildbot-slave/files/patch-buildslave__test____init__.py   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/devel/buildbot-slave/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/buildbot-slave/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/buildbot-slave/files/patch-setup.py   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/buildbot-slave/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/devel/buildbot-slave/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/buildbot-slave/Makefile	Sun Mar 10 08:39:21 2013	(r313816)
+++ head/devel/buildbot-slave/Makefile	Sun Mar 10 08:51:21 2013	(r313817)
@@ -1,26 +1,44 @@
-# New ports collection makefile for:	buildbot-slave
-# Date created:		12 Jul 2010
-# Whom:			Frederic Praca <frederic.praca@freebsd-fr.org>
-#
+# Created by: Frederic Praca <frederic.praca@freebsd-fr.org>
 # $FreeBSD$
-#
 
 PORTNAME=	buildbot-slave
-PORTVERSION=	0.8.6p1
+PORTVERSION=	0.8.7p1
 CATEGORIES=	devel python
 MASTER_SITES=	GOOGLE_CODE
 
-MAINTAINER=	tj@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	koobs@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Slave part of Buildbot, an continuous integration system
 
-PROJECTHOST=	buildbot
-USE_PYTHON=	2.5+
-USE_PYDISTUTILS=	yes
+LICENSE=	GPLv2
+
+TEST_DEPENDS:=	${RUN_DEPENDS} \
+		trial:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-twistedCore \
+		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}mock>0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-mock
+
+PROJECTHOST=		buildbot
+USE_PYTHON=		yes
+USE_PYDISTUTILS=	easy_install
 USE_TWISTED_RUN=	runner
 
-post-patch:
-	@${FIND} ${WRKSRC} -type f | ${XARGS} -n 10 ${REINPLACE_CMD} -e \
-		's|/usr/bin/python|${PYTHON_CMD}|g'
-	@${FIND} ${WRKSRC} -name \*.bak -delete
+MAKE_ENV+=		NO_INSTALL_REQS=1
+
+OPTIONS_DEFINE=		TESTS
+TESTS_DESC=		Install py-mock for unit tests
+# Ports infrastructure bug
+OPTIONSFILE?=		${PORT_DBDIR}/py-${PORTNAME}/options
+
+.include <bsd.port.options.mk>
+
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MTESTS}
+BUILD_DEPENDS:=	${TEST_DEPENDS}
+.endif
+
+MAN1=	buildslave.1
+
+post-install:
+	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/docs/buildslave.1 ${MANPREFIX}/man/man1
+
+regression-test:
+	@cd ${WRKSRC} && trial buildslave.test
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/devel/buildbot-slave/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/buildbot-slave/distinfo	Sun Mar 10 08:39:21 2013	(r313816)
+++ head/devel/buildbot-slave/distinfo	Sun Mar 10 08:51:21 2013	(r313817)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (buildbot-slave-0.8.6p1.tar.gz) = 43e6f94a7c37e103af755bc4f9b2ede945cf3c4247b22f595c5ab1c21ccf092f
-SIZE (buildbot-slave-0.8.6p1.tar.gz) = 101660
+SHA256 (buildbot-slave-0.8.7p1.tar.gz) = bbdb07a3847efa186f942142a09394b467d7375745c49da0a42e9aa5b206eadc
+SIZE (buildbot-slave-0.8.7p1.tar.gz) = 104575

Added: head/devel/buildbot-slave/files/patch-buildslave__test____init__.py
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/devel/buildbot-slave/files/patch-buildslave__test____init__.py	Sun Mar 10 08:51:21 2013	(r313817)
@@ -0,0 +1,12 @@
+--- ./buildslave/test/__init__.py.orig	2012-12-07 22:20:33.655375165 +1100
++++ ./buildslave/test/__init__.py	2012-12-07 22:21:11.070790866 +1100
+@@ -58,6 +58,6 @@
+     import mock
+     mock = mock
+ except ImportError:
+-    print >>sys.stderr, ("\nBuildbot tests require the 'mock' module; "
+-                         "try 'pip install mock'")
+-    os._exit(1)
++    raise ImportError("Buildbot tests require the 'mock' module; "
++                      "try 'pip install mock'")
++

Modified: head/devel/buildbot-slave/files/patch-setup.py
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/buildbot-slave/files/patch-setup.py	Sun Mar 10 08:39:21 2013	(r313816)
+++ head/devel/buildbot-slave/files/patch-setup.py	Sun Mar 10 08:51:21 2013	(r313817)
@@ -1,21 +1,15 @@
---- setup.py.orig	2011-06-20 11:58:27.000000000 +0800
-+++ setup.py	2011-06-20 11:59:29.000000000 +0800
-@@ -103,18 +103,4 @@
- if sys.platform == "win32":
-     setup_args['zip_safe'] = False
+--- ./setup.py.orig	2012-09-23 00:57:03.000000000 +1000
++++ ./setup.py	2012-12-07 22:19:57.724590221 +1100
+@@ -105,11 +105,7 @@
+         }
+     }
  
--try:
--    # If setuptools is installed, then we'll add setuptools-specific arguments
--    # to the setup args.
--    import setuptools #@UnusedImport
--except ImportError:
--    pass
--else:
--    setup_args['install_requires'] = [
--        'twisted >= 8.0.0',
--    ]
--
--    if os.getenv('NO_INSTALL_REQS'):
--        setup_args['install_requires'] = None
--
- setup(**setup_args)
+-# set zip_safe to false to force Windows installs to always unpack eggs
+-# into directories, which seems to work better --
+-# see http://buildbot.net/trac/ticket/907
+-if sys.platform == "win32":
+-    setup_args['zip_safe'] = False
++setup_args['zip_safe'] = False
+ 
+ try:
+     # If setuptools is installed, then we'll add setuptools-specific arguments
